posts.author: tbhavesh
posts.community: Hitachi Energy - A Century old MNC in a new bottle!
posts.text: O don’t think there will be any material impact to Hitachi Energy. These Chinese firms has been supplying their equipment’s to Indian EPC players like Kalpataru, Sterlite and KEC which eventually ends up working at government projects - Government had banned their bidding, but not their supplies and usage. Government will not touch the core components of Hitachi Energy as they may have integration challenges with other products. Hitachi Energy has their order book full for next few years and still expanding - demand is massive. Hitachi Energy also exports equipment’s made in India. Other than…

posts.author: rajesh_b_2k
posts.community: Hitachi Energy - A Century old MNC in a new bottle!
posts.text: It is a concern as it allows other companies to bid. But Hitachi may not be heavily impacted as it has ~29,000 crore backlog for multiple quarters. However, market have included that and given such rich PE valuation. That can take a dent. However, company is not relying on India. It has 27-30% revenue coming from exports. Export revenue grew about 34.5% YoY in FY25 , faster than domestic revenue growth. That is positive.
